default.title: Horizon Tech | Software, igwe ojii, na AI
default.description: Horizon Tech na-emepụta ma na-anapụta ngwanrọ ụlọ ọrụ, ngwọta AI, akụrụngwa igwe ojii, na ngwaahịa dijitalụ maka ndị otu na-achọsi ike.

home.title: Horizon Tech | Engineering Systems That Scale
home.description: Ngwanrọ ụlọ ọrụ, AI / ML, akụrụngwa igwe ojii, na nnyefe IoT maka ndị otu ụwa.

about.title: Banyere Horizon Tech | Ọrụ ụlọ ọrụ na otu
about.description: Mụta banyere Horizon Tech, ọrụ anyị, na otu anyị si ewepụta ngwọta teknụzụ dị elu.

team.title: Otu | Horizon Tech Leadership na ndị ọkachamara
team.description: Zute ndị injinia na ndị isi na-ewu ngwanrọ ụlọ ọrụ na nyiwe igwe ojii na Horizon Tech.

careers.title: Ọrụ | Jiri Horizon Tech wuo
careers.description: Nyochaa ọrụ mepere emepe ma bulie ọrụ gị na ndị otu injinia Horizon Tech.

contact.title: Kpọtụrụ Horizon Tech | Malite ọrụ gị
contact.description: Kpọtụrụ Horizon Tech iji kwurịta ọrụ gị, mkpa teknụzụ, na usoro nnyefe.

caseStudies.title: Ọmụmụ ihe | Nsonaazụ Horizon Tech
caseStudies.description: Gụọ ọmụmụ ihe ndị ahịa na nsonaazụ nke Horizon Tech na-enye n'ofe ụlọ ọrụ.

blog.title: Blog | Horizon Tech Insights
blog.description: Nghọta teknụzụ, nkuzi nnyefe, na ntuziaka ụkpụrụ ụlọ sitere na Horizon Tech.

education.title: Mmụta | Horizon Tech Learning Resources
education.description: Ntuziaka, ntụaka, na akụrụngwa mmụta teknụzụ sitere na Horizon Tech.

support.title: Nkwado | Horizon Tech
support.description: Nweta nkwado na nhọrọ kọntaktị maka ọrụ Horizon Tech.

privacy.title: Amụma nzuzo | Horizon Tech
privacy.description: Gụọ iwu nzuzo nke Horizon Tech na nkwa nchedo data.

terms.title: Usoro nke Ọrụ | Horizon Tech
terms.description: Gụọ usoro ọrụ Horizon Tech maka weebụsaịtị anyị na ọrụ anyị.

profile.title: Profaịlụ | Horizon Tech
profile.description: Jikwaa profaịlụ Horizon Tech gị, ntọala, na nkọwa akaụntụ.

firstTimeSetup.title: Ntọala Oge Mbụ | Horizon Tech
firstTimeSetup.description: Mezue ntọala akaụntụ mbụ iji gaa n'ihu na Horizon Tech.

forgotPassword.title: Echefuru paswọọdụ | Horizon Tech
forgotPassword.description: Tọgharịa ohere na akaụntụ Horizon Tech gị.

resetPassword.title: Tọgharịa paswọọdụ | Horizon Tech
resetPassword.description: Mepụta paswọọdụ ọhụrụ maka akaụntụ Horizon Tech gị.

confirmEmail.title: Kwado Email | Horizon Tech
confirmEmail.description: Kwado adreesị ozi-e gị iji rụọ ọrụ akaụntụ Horizon Tech gị.

admin.title: Ogwe nchịkwa | Horizon Tech
admin.description: Ọrụ nchịkwa maka njikwa ikpo okwu Horizon Tech.

unauthorized.title: Enweghị ikike | Horizon Tech
unauthorized.description: N'oge a, ị gaghị enwe ike ịnweta peeji nke Horizon Tech a.

services.title: Ọrụ | Horizon Tech
services.description: Nyochaa ọrụ Horizon Tech na injinịa ngwanrọ, AI, igwe ojii, DevOps, na mgbanwe dijitalụ.

innovationLab.title: Innovation Lab | Horizon Tech
innovationLab.description: Lee nnwale Horizon Tech na prototypes na AI na injinia etinyere.

authCallback.title: Ịbanye | Horizon Tech
authCallback.description: Mezue nbanye dị nchebe maka akaụntụ Horizon Tech gị.
